steps.title: On the worker, merge the finished feature branch into `development`, push `development`, merge `development` into `main`, push `main`, and create and push a release tag from that exact promoted commit

On the manager, check out or update the runtime to the promoted release target and restart it through `bun run deploy-manager-runtime <release-tag>` or `bun run deploy-manager-runtime` when deploying the promoted `origin/main` revision
Verify the runtime checkout revision match and frontend-backend version match
Check `http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health` and confirm the dashboard and manager report healthy status
